Ruby
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.

Class: ALL
Race: ALL

worth
QuoteReply
# May 12 2008 at 7:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Ruby does indeed cost a lot... Also used by enchanter/enchantress to make A vial of Purified Mana... which costs approximately 530 plat..... and sells in the bazaar for 540 to 1000 plat.... depending on which server you are on....4 ruby and 1 poison vial and the spell purify mana memmed is what an enchanter must have to make the "A vial of purified mana"

Edited, May 12th 2008 11:50pm by smithgib
▲ Page top
Costs
QuoteReply
# May 23 2007 at 3:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1697415410975
Scholar
204 posts
With my 65 bard with over 200 charisma, and ally faction with the Coalition of Tradefolk, Svena Ironforge in Qeynos (jewellry seller) still sells a ruby to me for 131pp 2g 4s 9c. i figured i could at least get down to 100p but, alas.

damn Crown of Deceit quest is costing me dearly!

# Jan 19 2002 at 5:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966162592
25 posts
first time i see that !

i found with a friend a ruby on a blue
froglok berserker for lvl 30 in swamp of no hope (kunark) on sullon zek server.

think i am going to stay a lot in this zone :D
▲ Page top
Prices on Rubies
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757052268
13 posts
These can be bought from merchants for 131P with CHA over 101 and good faction. This is the lowest price you can get, period! They can also be resold to Merchants for 119P with good CHA and faction. I use these gems to "store" my lootings until I can get to a bank. I often sell these to players for 125P in EC and use them for trade on items that cost more plat than I care to tote.

Tinkle LilBelle
Bard for www.brambledmoon.com
▲ Page top
RE: Prices on Rubies
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2001 at 9:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250865034
2 posts
I looted a rubie off a giant at the Fort in WW. Pretty rare I suppose. So if you got the time go there to save some plat.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 01 2001 at 7:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTF what creathers do you get it off of TELL ME PLEASE i need to know i want the ax in the gem quest and i dont even have one PLAT so please tell me PLEASE

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 05 2001 at 5:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok, lets use our imagination, make a high cha newbie, give it money, have it buy the gems, you'll save a bundle.
